handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260406 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
client req_account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"All","tags":["NetLiquidation"]}
server account_summary_end {"req_id":"$req1"}
client req_account_summary {"req_id":"$req2","account":"All","tags":["BuyingPower"]}
server account_summary_end {"req_id":"$req2"}
sleep 2s
client cancel_account_summary {"req_id":"$req1"}
client cancel_account_summary {"req_id":"$req2"}
disconnect
